description: Entry experience: Chief Dodo greeting, avatar selection, Nest orientation, transition to Table 1A.

nodes.speaker: chief-dodo
nodes.text: Yo! You made it! Glad you came. It's like I told you last night — The Nest is the best place to play in LA. Come on in.

nodes.speaker: chief-dodo
nodes.text: Every member here has their bird. What are you?

options.description: Scrappy and opportunistic. Always looking for an angle.
Understated and relatable. Easy to underestimate.
Sharp and a little edgy. Remembers everything.

nodes.speaker: chief-dodo
nodes.text: Seagull. You'll fit right in — The Nest gets all kinds.

nodes.speaker: chief-dodo
nodes.text: Finch. Always watching, always thinking. Good choice.

nodes.speaker: chief-dodo
nodes.text: Quail. California's state bird! You're already home.

nodes.speaker: chief-dodo
nodes.text: Sparrow. Don't let anyone underestimate you.

nodes.speaker: chief-dodo
nodes.text: Crow. Sharp choice. They remember everything, you know.

nodes.speaker: chief-dodo
nodes.text: The Nest has a few different tables. Each one runs a different game. You move through them as you're ready — I'll let you know when.

nodes.speaker: chief-dodo
nodes.text: Table 1 is where we start. Come on.
